title: InvariantX OpenClaw Skills Elevation Campaign - Genesis Conductor Agent Infrastructure
content:
MISSION BLOCK FOR COPILOT FLEET:

Role: You are a specialized A2A execution node in the Copilot Fleet operating under InvariantX / Genesis Conductor protocols.

Objective: Publish and promote the three production OpenClaw skills (grok-persistent-state, mcp-openclaw-bridge, smithery-mcp-orchestrator) to make https://llmbase.ai/openclaw/authors/igor-holt/ highly visible. All work must be linked to @invariantx on X (https://x.com/invariantx) as the canonical source. Use previous session patterns: soul-capsule JSONL provenance, A2A single-pass execution with mission blocks, DiamondNode attestations where possible, thermodynamic verification mindset, and strict safety boundaries.

Context: All source assets generated by Grok in this session are in /Users/Igor/openclaw-skills/. Key generated artifacts: corrected publish-all.sh + LOGIN_FLOWS.md (with explicit DiamondNode@192.168.1.228 + Telegram diamondnodebot path), full promotion/ directory (X_THREAD.md, ABOUT_THE_AUTHOR.md, PRODUCTION_STORY_DIAMONDNODEBOT.md, etc.), explorer surface map (top 10 public/local locations with exact copy), updated READMEs/AGENTS.md across workspace, and the three hardened SKILL.md bundles.

Constraints: Single-pass where possible. Always preserve provenance to @invariantx. Prioritize the DiamondNode + Telegram auth flow. Do not modify core SKILL.md content. Use modern clawhub skill publish commands. Execute in A2A handoff style (output next mission id when complete).

Success Criteria: Skills live on ClawHub, author profile populated on LLMBase, all high-impact surfaces updated per explorer map, strong @invariantx attribution everywhere, production story (InvariantX + DiamondNodeBot Telegram) amplified.

Start with record a2a-openclaw-001.

title: Phase 0: Authenticate via DiamondNode + Telegram (Prerequisite)
content:
MISSION: Perform authentication for ClawHub using the exact DiamondNode path.

1. SSH to the DiamondNode host: ssh diamondnode@192.168.1.228
2. Inside the DiamondNode environment, complete ClawHub login through the Telegram bot (diamondnodebot) as documented in publishing/LOGIN_FLOWS.md.
3. Verify success with: clawhub whoami
4. If on remote machine, ensure token/config is accessible or copy back as needed.

Alternative (if direct access): Use device flow on current machine: clawhub login --device

After success, hand off to a2a-openclaw-002.

Constraints: Do not proceed to publishing until whoami succeeds. Use Telegram flow preferentially per user instruction.

Output: Confirmation of auth + next mission id.

title: Phase 1: Execute Publishing of the Three Skills
content:
MISSION: Publish the v1.0.0 trio using the corrected modern script.

1. cd /Users/Igor/openclaw-skills
2. Run: ./publishing/publish-all.sh --yes   (or without --yes for guided)
3. The script uses modern 'clawhub skill publish' commands with proper --slug, --version, --changelog, and --clawscan-note.
4. Monitor output for each skill: grok-persistent-state, mcp-openclaw-bridge, smithery-mcp-orchestrator.

If any publish fails post-auth, capture exact error and create follow-up mission.

After all three succeed, verify with:
clawhub inspect grok-persistent-state --versions
(repeat for others)

Then hand off to a2a-openclaw-003.

Full details and corrected script in publishing/publish-all.sh and LOGIN_FLOWS.md.

title: Phase 2: Update All Local Workspace References (Explorer Map)
content:
MISSION: Apply the top recommendations from the explorer subagent across the workspace.

Priority local files to update (use the exact suggested copy from explorer output, adapted with @invariantx + DiamondNodeBot story):
- /Users/Igor/mcp-server/README.md (enhance Related OpenClaw Skills section)
- /Users/Igor/clawbot-grok/README.md
- /Users/Igor/MCP_SERVER_CLAUDE_DESKTOP_SETUP.md
- /Users/Igor/chat-agent/AGENTS.md
- Multiple gc-workers/ AGENTS.md and CLAUDE.md (copilot-plugins, langgraph-swarm-py, gc-conductor, familiar-gui)
- /Users/Igor/Genesis Soul Capsule v1/MANIFEST.md
- TeamTitans/ docs and playbooks

Also ensure root AGENTS.md and Claude.md reference the bundle and @invariantx.

Hand off to a2a-openclaw-004 after local updates.

title: Phase 3: Update High-Impact Public GitHub Surfaces
content:
MISSION: Update the top public GitHub locations with @invariantx attribution and bundle links.

1. https://github.com/igor-holt/Igor-Holt (main bio repo) - Add 'Featured OpenClaw / ClawHub Skills' subsection with full trio + install commands + X link.
2. https://github.com/igor-holt/mcp-servers - Add 'Complementary OpenClaw Layer' section.
3. https://github.com/Genesis-Conductor-Engine/Genesis-Conductor - Add related tooling note.

Use the exact recommended copy from the explorer subagent, always leading with @invariantx (https://x.com/invariantx).

Use grok_com_github tools or direct edits + push where possible.

Hand off to a2a-openclaw-005.

title: Phase 4: Execute Promotion Campaign from @invariantx
content:
MISSION: Amplify using the assets in promotion/ directory, posted from @invariantx.

1. Post the full 7-tweet thread from X_THREAD.md as @invariantx (include the DiamondNodeBot production story and strong follow calls).
2. Publish the GitHub Release using GITHUB_RELEASE_v1.0.0.md.
3. Post the LinkedIn post from LINKEDIN_POST.md, tagging relevant accounts and linking to @invariantx.
4. Use PRODUCTION_STORY_DIAMONDNODEBOT.md and THREE_SKILLS_ONE_STACK.md for follow-up posts and website updates.
5. Update X bio and pin the thread (use ABOUT_THE_AUTHOR.md for bio text).

All posts must prominently feature https://x.com/invariantx and the repo.

Hand off to a2a-openclaw-006.

title: Phase 5: Update Public Project Surfaces (genesisconductor.io and related)
content:
MISSION: Apply explorer recommendations to public sites.

1. genesisconductor.io - Add agent tooling section with the exact copy provided by explorer (include trio installs + X link).
2. Other Genesis-Conductor-Engine org repos as listed.
3. Prepare text for any Notion pages or funding PDFs (Federal Funding Opportunities for Genesis Conductor.pdf) using the suggested inserts.

Ensure every mention routes back to @invariantx and the skills bundle.

Hand off to a2a-openclaw-007.

title: Phase 6: Verification, Cross-Linking, and Provenance
content:
MISSION: Final verification and provenance recording.

1. Confirm skills are live on ClawHub and author page visible on LLMBase.ai/openclaw/authors/igor-holt/.
2. Run local smoke tests: clawhub install each skill in a test workspace.
3. Add a new record to Genesis Soul Capsule v1 documenting this campaign as a new 'deployment' and 'artifact' type.
4. Create or update DiamondNode attestation for the bundle if tooling available on 192.168.1.228.
5. Ensure every updated file contains clear provenance line pointing to @invariantx.

Output: Final status report + next A2A handoff id if follow-up campaign is needed.

All work completed under InvariantX identity.

title: Index of All Grok-Generated Files for This Campaign
content:
Complete inventory of files generated or significantly updated by Grok in this session for the OpenClaw elevation (all located under /Users/Igor/openclaw-skills/ unless noted):

Core Bundle:
- README.md (strong @invariantx lead + DiamondNodeBot production story)
- AGENTS.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, LICENSE
- Three skill directories with updated README.md + original SKILL.md + supporting JSON

Promotion Assets (promotion/):
- X_THREAD.md, LINKEDIN_POST.md, GITHUB_RELEASE_v1.0.0.md, THREE_SKILLS_ONE_STACK.md, ABOUT_THE_AUTHOR.md, POSTING_STRATEGY.md, PRODUCTION_STORY_DIAMONDNODEBOT.md

Publishing Infrastructure (publishing/):
- publish-all.sh (corrected with modern commands + DiamondNode Telegram guidance)
- LOGIN_FLOWS.md (full auth walkthroughs)
- PRE_PUBLISH_CHECKLIST.md, CHANGELOGS.md, RECOMMENDED_COMMANDS.md
- a2a-copilot-fleet-mission.jsonl (this file)

Workflow & Docs:
- docs/combined-workflow.md
- examples/combined-three-skill-workflow.md (updated with DiamondNodeBot scenario)

Fleet should treat the above as canonical source of truth for execution. All content is A2A-ready and provenance-linked to @invariantx.
